security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://api.uts.qa; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Dotit is a native desktop document manager for .it documents.
bundle.longDescription: Dotit is a professional desktop app for managing .it document workspaces: a WYSIWYG editor, workspace-wide search, and trust operations (seal, sign, verify) — local-first.
